title: Reshaped Vanilla x Programmer art
description: Makes the reshaped vanilla pack look older.
body:
# **What does this pack do?**

It does the same thing as reshaped vanilla, but with the old textures! Here are some screenshots.

![Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2008b61ebf68b404640534d1f6d064caf61d339.png)

![Badlands creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b1ef2f7d70f44ad429e5099bde3e58f88c7c3cb.png)

![Winter zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c71efeecce55fcbbe9ddc55ff9cc7c5e8d6335c6.png)

![Winter creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f2a52ff213e93166eee2019764d6da108cad1c9.png)

![Desert creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7028fa1674e8fd4538d9a26c15e06771eeed2be3.png)

![Planks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe3736dfee218e3d1574996459fac3261cfc38bc.png)

# **Installation Guide:**

**Windows:**
1. Go to your files to %appdata% and then go to the /.minecraft/ folder.
2. Go to /.minecraft/resourcepacks.
3. Put the resourcepack in the folder.

**Linux:**

1. Go to your files to your /.minecraft/ folder.
2. Then go to /resourcepacks/.
3. Put the resourcepack in the same folder.

**MacOS**

1. Go to ~/.minecraft/resourcepacks/ in your file manager.
2. Put the pack inside that folder.


# 

Thanks for Downloading!
